children.text: Connect a bank account with the app, and the daily management of your finances via your mobile phone will become simple and convenient.

Your account balance, a nearby ATM or a shop offering discounts will be displayed without logging in.
You will have access to confidential data and history of transactions by logging in with the use of one PIN code.

Enter the account number or mobile phone number of the beneficiary and you will order a transfer directly from the app.
You will confirm your transaction with the PIN number which you use for logging in to the app.
Whenever you select an offer from the benefit zone and pay from your synchronized bank account, part of the money will always return to your account.
